name: eyebrow-2
text: NAVIGATION AND HERO
textPreview: NAVIGATION AND HERO

name: title-2
text: The first screen positions Stroque as a marketplace for commercial art projects.
textPreview: The first screen positions Stroque as a marketplace for commercial art projects.

name: body-2
text: The navigation keeps the primary routes visible while the hero explains who the product serves and what action to take next.
textPreview: The navigation keeps the primary routes visible while the hero explains who the product serves and what action to take next.

name: nav-heading
text: What the screen proves

name: nav-body
text:
Navbar: brand, Artists, Log in, Sign up.
Hero: clear business-space positioning.
Calls to action: Find Artists and Join as Artist.

name: eyebrow-3
text: HOMEPAGE PROOF POINTS
textPreview: HOMEPAGE PROOF POINTS

name: title-3
text: The homepage uses market signals and local events to make discovery feel active.
textPreview: The homepage uses market signals and local events to make discovery feel active.

name: body-3
text: The content is not only a landing page; it gives buyers categories, local context, and reasons to continue exploring.
textPreview: The content is not only a landing page; it gives buyers categories, local context, and reasons to continue exploring.

name: footer-source-3
text: Source: stroque-art-portal.vercel.app and test-mode local dashboard

name: home-labels
text: Project demand categories          Local art calendar          Artist of the week
textPreview: Project demand categories          Local art calendar          Artist of the week

name: eyebrow-4
text: HOMEPAGE EDUCATION
textPreview: HOMEPAGE EDUCATION

name: title-4
text: The lower homepage turns browsing into a simple buyer workflow.
textPreview: The lower homepage turns browsing into a simple buyer workflow.

name: body-4
text: Art news explains why local art matters, and the process section reduces the commissioning path to three clear steps.
textPreview: Art news explains why local art matters, and the process section reduces the commissioning path to three clear steps.

name: footer-source-4
text: Source: stroque-art-portal.vercel.app and test-mode local dashboard

name: workflow-meaning-heading
text: Presentation takeaway
textPreview: Presentation takeaway

name: workflow-meaning-body
text: This is useful for a demo because it lets the presenter move from brand story to concrete product workflow without leaving the homepage.
textPreview: This is useful for a demo because it lets the presenter move from brand story to concrete product workflow without leaving the homepage.

name: eyebrow-5
text: ARTIST DISCOVERY
textPreview: ARTIST DISCOVERY

name: title-5
text: The directory makes artist selection filterable instead of purely visual.
textPreview: The directory makes artist selection filterable instead of purely visual.

name: body-5
text: Buyers can search by term, style, service, location, and budget. The result cards summarize the fields needed for a first shortlist.
textPreview: Buyers can search by term, style, service, location, and budget. The result cards summarize the fields needed for a first shortlist.

text: ARTIST PROFILE AND REQUEST
textPreview: ARTIST PROFILE AND REQUEST

name: title-6
text: The artist profile connects visual proof to a structured project request.
textPreview: The artist profile connects visual proof to a structured project request.
